title: tpm2-rs git dep pinned to bare commit SHA — no changelog or version tag referenced
description: wolftpm-tss/Cargo.toml pins tpm2-rs-client and tpm2-rs-base to rev = 'a7bf0e9126bab6c607a27a30e2f3df65f7e95371'. A bare SHA with no corresponding tag or release note means: (1) when tpm-rs eventually publishes to crates.io this crate cannot be published; (2) if the tpm-rs repo is force-pushed or the commit is orphaned, this crate stops building with no warning; (3) reviewers and auditors cannot determine what version of the TPM-rs API is being used. Should reference a tag if available, or document the exact tpm-rs version this corresponds to in a comment.
